records.name: Serve intraday bars with executable fallback
preconditions: mkt.price_15m may be sparse while mkt.price_1m has data
steps: Fallback to mkt.price_1m when primary is unusable
Return normalized envelope with accurate source
postconditions: Intraday response behavior matches declared fallback contract

records.name: Canonical envelope for target-zones endpoint
preconditions: target zone rows exist for latest forecast date

records.name: Canonical envelope for forecast-targets endpoint
preconditions: target zone rows exist for latest forecast date
steps: Parse canonical envelope contract or explicit typed adapter equivalent

records.name: Normalize ingest lifecycle status across producers
preconditions: Ingest run starts and reaches terminal outcome
steps: Update terminal row with canonical status vocabulary
postconditions: Ops queries and alerts consume one status contract

records.name: Approval-gated training and promotion execution
postconditions: Unauthorized non-dry train/promote execution is blocked

records.name: Route degraded-mode transparency under trusted-pull failure
preconditions: Runtime trusted-market pull fails or degrades
steps: Emit fallback payload with provenance metadata
postconditions: Consumers can distinguish degraded mode from fully fresh output

records.name: Operator startup docs stay aligned with authority rules
postconditions: No conflicting hardcoded-port startup assumptions remain

records.name: Write bug writeups to canonical path
Write fix patches to canonical path
Write regression-test patches to canonical path
Store code review outputs in canonical directory
postconditions: Code review artifacts are discoverable at canonical path

records.name: Store spec audit outputs in canonical directory
postconditions: Spec audit artifacts are discoverable at canonical path

records.name: Store sidecar JSON results in canonical directory
steps: Save result JSON files to quality/results

records.name: Store and execute mechanical verification artifacts
steps: Emit verify.sh and case files under quality/mechanical

records.name: Preserve canonical top-level quality layout
steps: Write artifacts to top-level quality subdirectories
